title: Structured Verdict Review/Test Control Flow
description: Non-runnable feature root for introducing structured review/test verdict fields, verdict-first scheduler behavior, compatibility warnings for legacy outputs, and regression coverage for false-block prevention.
acceptance_criteria: Review and tester flows prefer structured verdict fields over free-form remaining text when deciding done vs blocked state.
Legacy review/test outputs without verdict still work through a compatibility path with an execution-history warning.
Prompt and guardrail guidance require structured verdict output for reviewer and tester agents.
Regression tests cover approved, needs_changes, legacy fallback, and false-block prevention cases.
